title: Harden Lead Database Capture and Implement Real-time Email Alerts

validationsPassed: SnakeCase to CamelCase property mapping verification
Correct data insertion for Name, Phone, Email, Dob, SSN, and Job Details
Robust client-side gamification fallback in case of sync failure
Safe and audited credential handling for SSN and private data

notificationSystem.emailTemplate: High-fidelity HTML with dynamic styling tailored for dark-mode screens, matching Richard Automotive Command Center guidelines
notificationSystem.triggerHook: Asynchronous invocation within addLead core service

modifiedFiles.description: Imported sendTransactionalEmail and added live email notification alert async dispatch to Richard on every lead capture.
Imported missing sentinelAI module to prevent TypeScript build failures.
Imported missing Loader2 icon from lucide-react to ensure error-free builds.
